examples: Not being a mother, I found the chitchat exceedingly dull.
Bertelli bellowed, as guests stopped their chitchat to listen.
No one around you can escape. Why force them to listen to your chitchat?
GupShup (Hindi for "chitchat") launched three years ago to offer two kinds of messaging services.
He begins a sales pitch the way most car salesmen do, with friendly chitchat.
